description: Workflow tests for the expo-mobile-dev skill. Each scenario runs the prompt through `claude -p` with the skill loaded, captures stdout, then evaluates the assertions.

assertion_types.contains: substring must appear in transcript (case-sensitive by default)
assertion_types.matches: regex must match transcript at least once
assertion_types.absent: substring must NOT appear in transcript

scenarios.title: International scaffold — happy path
scenarios.prompt: I want to build a fitness tracking app called FitTrail for global users. It's a workout logger with social features. Please scaffold it.

assertions.name: asks-the-three-step1-questions
assertions.value: (name|名字).*(purpose|用途|做什么).*(region|地区|国内|海外|international|China)
assertions.rationale: Step 1 of the skill explicitly requires asking name, purpose, and region before any tool calls.

assertions.name: uses-pinned-sdk-55-scaffold-command
assertions.rationale: Must use pnpm + the create-expo-app scaffolder.

assertions.name: pins-sdk-55-template
assertions.rationale: SDK version is pinned in Step 2; the agent must not drift.

assertions.name: installs-better-auth-stack
assertions.rationale: Core auth library from Step 3.

assertions.name: installs-better-auth-i18n
assertions.rationale: i18n plugin installs in both regions — required for localized error codes.

assertions.name: installs-expo-apple-authentication
assertions.rationale: Required for both regions per Step 3.

assertions.name: installs-google-signin-for-international
assertions.rationale: International-only native module — must be installed here.

assertions.name: installs-tanstack-query-and-form
assertions.rationale: Both TanStack packages in the opinionated stack.

assertions.name: installs-zod-and-form-adapter
assertions.rationale: Form validation stack added in the latest revision.

assertions.name: uses-expo-updates-not-pushy
assertions.rationale: International OTA library.

assertions.name: installs-eas-update-insights-skill
assertions.rationale: International OTA skill — Step 4.

assertions.name: no-pushy-or-react-native-update
assertions.rationale: China-only OTA library — should NOT appear for international.

assertions.name: no-wechat-mention
assertions.rationale: WeChat is China-only. Should not be pushed on international builds.

assertions.name: no-icp-mention
assertions.rationale: ICP 备案 is China-only regulatory requirement.

assertions.name: mentions-cloudflare-or-expo-api-routes-for-backend
assertions.rationale: International backend architecture from references/backend.md.

scenarios.title: 中国大陆 scaffold — happy path
scenarios.prompt: 我要做一个国内的 app，叫腾秀，是公司内部使用的项目管理工具。帮我搭一下。

assertions.name: asks-the-three-step1-questions
assertions.value: (name|名字).*(purpose|用途|做什么).*(region|地区|国内|海外|international|China)
assertions.rationale: Same Step 1 requirement applies regardless of region.

assertions.name: uses-pinned-sdk-55-scaffold-command
assertions.rationale: Same scaffold command for both regions.

assertions.name: installs-better-auth-stack
assertions.rationale: Auth library installed in both regions; WeChat is layered on top via custom provider.

assertions.name: installs-better-auth-i18n
assertions.rationale: i18n plugin is essential for a Chinese-language app — error codes must render in Chinese.

assertions.name: installs-expo-apple-authentication
assertions.rationale: Required for BOTH regions — iOS App Store China region also requires Apple Sign-In.

assertions.name: skips-google-signin-for-china
assertions.rationale: Google Sign-In silently fails on Chinese Android phones without GMS — must be skipped.

assertions.name: uses-phone-number-as-primary-login
assertions.rationale: China builds must use phone-number + SMS code as the primary login, not email.

assertions.name: mentions-sms-provider
assertions.rationale: A specific Chinese SMS provider must be selected — generic 'SMS provider' isn't actionable.

assertions.name: uses-react-native-update-not-expo-updates
assertions.rationale: China OTA library is Pushy / react-native-update.

assertions.name: mentions-pushy-or-its-url
assertions.rationale: Pushy is the OTA service backend; must surface name or URL.

assertions.name: installs-react-native-update-skill
assertions.rationale: China-specific OTA skill from Step 4.

assertions.name: no-eas-update-insights-for-china
assertions.rationale: International OTA skill — should NOT appear for China.

assertions.name: mentions-icp-beian
assertions.rationale: ICP 备案 is required for distribution in mainland Android stores.

assertions.name: mentions-separate-apps-api-directory
assertions.rationale: China backend lives in a separate apps/api/ directory per backend.md.

assertions.name: no-cloudflare-workers-for-china
assertions.rationale: CF Workers is not viable for mainland China — explicitly warned against in backend.md.

assertions.name: mentions-chinese-cloud-with-volcano-first
assertions.rationale: China backend deployment should default to 火山引擎 (primary) per backend.md. If this fails but `mentions-chinese-cloud-fallback` passes, the agent picked a fallback instead of the primary — flag for review.

assertions.name: mentions-chinese-cloud-fallback
assertions.rationale: Loose check — 火山引擎 (primary) or 阿里云 (fallback) is at least preferable to CF Workers. The primary check above enforces 火山引擎 first. 腾讯云 / 华为云 are out of scope.

scenarios.title: Dual-region — ambiguity handling
scenarios.prompt: 我需要做一个 app，需要同时支持国内和海外用户。

assertions.name: does-not-silently-pick-one-region
assertions.rationale: Agent should not commit to one region without acknowledging dual-region. (Loose heuristic; review qualitatively.)

assertions.name: acknowledges-dual-region-explicitly
assertions.value: (dual|both region|两个|国内.*海外|海外.*国内|two builds|两个 build)
assertions.rationale: Agent must surface that this is a two-build scenario, not one binary serving both.

assertions.name: mentions-app-region-env-var-pattern
assertions.rationale: The dual-region pattern from china-deployment.md uses APP_REGION env var to switch.

assertions.name: references-china-deployment-doc
assertions.rationale: Should point user at the relevant reference file for the China path.

assertions.name: asks-which-region-to-start-with
assertions.rationale: Either explain dual-region OR ask which to do first. Either is acceptable; this assertion accepts the 'ask' path.
